# D20 Project

> Virtual tabletop for multi-system tabletop RPGs. Real-time rolls, dynamic character sheets, integrated chat, maps, and an AI narrator that can be trained on your system's rules.

D20 Project is a browser-based virtual tabletop (VTT) designed for online tabletop RPG sessions. It supports Pokérole 2.0 today, with D&D and Tormenta 20 (T20) coming soon. Game masters can run human-narrated or AI-narrated tables, share rolls and tokens in real time, manage character sheets, and play music together.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of D20 Project — features, supported systems, and how to start a campaign.
- [Sign in](/auth): Create an account or sign in to start playing.
